description: CompositionGrey hooded sweatshirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has full sleeves with ribbed hems and coloured strips near the armholes, baseball club logo in applique and print on the left chest, team number printed on the back, attached hood with checks on the outside and blue on the inside, drawcord to secure the hood, kangaroo pockets on the front and a ribbed hemFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this hooded sweatshirt from spykar. The thick fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you can either wear the hood or simply let it fall back loose to suit your style. Wear it over jeans to keep the cold winds away.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
